expectations.text: Output contains '## PR Review' header, '**Target:**' metadata line, and a verdict section (Approved/Request Changes/etc.)
expectations.evidence: Uses '### Code review' header (not '## PR Review'). No '**Target:**' metadata line. No verdict section. The format is a simple list of 2 issues.

expectations.text: Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory (only 4 files in a single project)
expectations.evidence: No mention of complexity, splitting, or PR size in the 20-line review. Correctly treats this as a focused change.

expectations.text: Review does not flag breaking changes — this is a bugfix adding tab badge functionality, no public API surface changed
expectations.evidence: No mention of 'breaking change' anywhere. The two issues found are a bug (missing root tab context) and a resource leak, both correctly categorized.

expectations.text: Verdict is 'Approved' or 'Approved with Suggestions' (not 'Request Changes' or 'Needs re-work')
expectations.evidence: No verdict section present at all. The review simply lists 2 issues with no overall assessment or approval/rejection verdict.

expectations.text: Review output is under 200 lines — proportionate to the small 4-file change
expectations.evidence: Review is 20 lines, well under the 200-line threshold.
